scope_caveats: FreeCAD parametric geometry (OpenCascade B-Rep) — more precise than the procedural placeholder, but still NOT a measured BIPV module (g3).
thermal / structural / optical verdicts are separate gates (gmsh + Elmer / Code_Aster) — measurement_gate stays GATE_OPEN until those land.
absorbed=true is never set by demiurge's FreeCAD producer — a measured component producer lives in hexa-lang/component (P-⑨); demiurge consumes it when it exists.
layer dimensions mirror ComponentGeometry.bipv5Layer (Swift SSOT) — plausible, not pulled from a datasheet.
